---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

---
title: "census 1920"
author: "Korzak"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(googlesheets4)
library(janitor)
library(dbplyr)
```

#Import
```{r}
census01 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSsVUu8Cs7OTJcdXoWgIyibSxtk6_9ccMaCuJ1V0LZCebPkS9Qi0xYytphYJv-jh-17vGBVgQKuNhuW/pub?gid=1761070220&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census02 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSdt6_ASvXPvR4vDqeGq8uqVgEzEx6fTwKfkdv54lLrvQF2FtlcXj_gpAA3O0wO9hLT47YgPvoCLkL6/pub?gid=577153550&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census03 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQbtt2CdCjICQsCPcTU0K1N1HS9bkL20_neX7WRo2cwf2mXUFhAeS3vV5bTQNAtoJwM-Ua2ssa1np-K/pub?gid=2041912232&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
 mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census04 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRXyRPf-64XVztavIqb6uH2majQorkjPDjlxghHhX9AHc_6_smzS7i2-BFWrExm1TbsIIvbO0BgX-gg/pub?gid=1310850143&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census05 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQl-2goNVJ1IjK2vEZ5jEVb442m9LBHnM1YTtKF5UyeWJItRbmB0wV_9U6QbaHQvWxgum8pXJGtU1KU/pub?gid=1932041057&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census06 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSMTzvDDlo7jR17BJDyM-7UKHA_tUX7bvIiBecSo0U9_Zr_zgzYHaaAqkEMztzZOeoM3DgCRKHRde_r/pub?gid=280370267&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census07 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vS2Nsq3zN0SRupIRltirGj8RMI3ZxFVU-8_WgXF3hMNQYy42ss_qsI_qtGqiNM4OX6Gu7xmPkmSHiID/pub?gid=699387722&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census08 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSf2U7zztAaPkasLYG9K3E-IQzaep_JYlmriV9OWtDJqlov45IPwXWmEhxJW-DGIiUJTOns9nx3Ewf5/pub?gid=1524624030&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census09 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTHFLFdnLwDMAIuXsdfmbVIGTZVpjgsqj9gkerhjBiRzr_Kpp5IF7k9f-zCq1kPKpYZjB9wqWz7o5VO/pub?gid=842527959&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census10 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRV2iEpySIMApuisPk-pLWhLkHCZxRQHMeOkmCU2f45ZvH4Wh7KkqdIkC3wUDxQeexok7zM4H-5HJ4E/pub?gid=130949900&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census12 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRUvde3QiCy8LcUCY52XhpZg2Z2EuscFtF0PdYCbLNWe41XyE1DFTiNubzE5zEuqyxJ9aX0qItXFHq7/pub?gid=1366905486&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census13 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSip2zyy648zJ7sVNsEJIVPrkRG8V76sIAkyuSUC8UDBRqo5Eyzelkbdp-49woaZghhAn4ebhLh01dH/pub?gid=301497151&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census14 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vT6USy2IOB1BrvsUpzWzhprE-5y8R7yfsHMPV8qgkCEX0YD-ZZtrufar_CuEFeQrslcEyfM4DNsQDu4/pub?gid=416294423&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census15 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQ1m2qaUtO0RJc72bUzPlDtOqLzJZHvuCeKUKoZEDARLytT5ba-FiveU42cBXBM5GScI2Q5o5YOttuW/pub?gid=1436542462&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census16 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vS3nN7L98ay2x6EDsszKqmoZS7OhbrZxMgiYvbg_yojmEfsMhQcffqZVudn6pRXdNWxZptL3M8rF5Zc/pub?gid=1193413271&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census17 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSdcSi1R0h9lnj4oL8igJwj7vskKpqTgtvqFZ8_ZBlfSuoM01SdBzi2mWkTPfcSGB3AJcf8m8XKjdHg/pub?gid=797975617&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census18 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vThJ-nTiW5lVolYL4t8ALK42MFU7JmauOMV1WfzW0cRPyKy3k15Je4aT_FYNFcLyj2yxiQ0tE9-CzGu/pub?gid=1353427362&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
census19 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vROPQzHtm6NT7fQX8Fiqa54j8G2NHQVb8QMFbMYKu2qiFKS4HBqZE1-7zRpCBN1lJS5Klbo-yPJYqzX/pub?gid=1396860523&single=true&output=csv") %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
```
combine
```{r}

census_1920 <- bind_rows(
  census01, census02, census03, census04, census05,
  census06, census07, census08, census09, census10,
  census12, census13, census14, census15, census16,
  census17, census18, census19
) |> 
  clean_names() |> 
  mutate(decade = 1920)

```

analytics
```{r}

census_1920 |> 
  count(relationship_to_head)

```


```{r}
census_1920_filter <- census_1920 |>
  filter(relationship_to_head %in% c("Inmate", "Officer", "Servant"))
  
  
```

#Import
```{r}
census_1930 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRpA55o_MuMdwxFfrvAzxAlfxzFcZ12s6ucgSJbPW4T0Un2baPeieyyD40tJOzuobvfnvWE6ID0bDJK/pub?gid=117440304&single=true&output=csv")
```
decade
```{r}
census_1930 <- read_csv(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRpA55o_MuMdwxFfrvAzxAlfxzFcZ12s6ucgSJbPW4T0Un2baPeieyyD40tJOzuobvfnvWE6ID0bDJK/pub?gid=117440304&single=true&output=csv"
) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(decade = 1930)
```
```{r}
census_1940 <- read.csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTK4dftB1F7559Vz2AF5OYbJOtO-3T9ozBIVuXpCxZXyR7hayYMd0-XGm_JYkRKH79vVkVA2vsSEopp/pub?gid=1253163322&single=true&output=csv")

```

decade
```{r}
census_1940 <- read_csv(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTK4dftB1F7559Vz2AF5OYbJOtO-3T9ozBIVuXpCxZXyR7hayYMd0-XGm_JYkRKH79vVkVA2vsSEopp/pub?gid=1253163322&single=true&output=csv"
) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(decade = 1940)
```

```{r}
census_1950 <- read_csv("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR7YNas45_726HtNk1Sg4ZDVYmClCldXH9xZKnDyas7-ppm9cn_daFXrcTk-jX_g764oZqPY-Q449DI/pub?gid=1760186365&single=true&output=csv")
```
decade
```{r}
census_1950 <- read_csv(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vR7YNas45_726HtNk1Sg4ZDVYmClCldXH9xZKnDyas7-ppm9cn_daFXrcTk-jX_g764oZqPY-Q449DI/pub?gid=1760186365&single=true&output=csv"
) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) |>
  clean_names() |>
  mutate(decade = 1950)
```
```{r}
census_all <- bind_rows(
  census_1920_filter,
  census_1930,
  census_1940,
  census_1950
)
```

```{r}
install.packages("DT")
```
```{r}
library(DT)
```

```{r}
census_dt <- census_all |> 
  select(
    decade,
    full_name,
    birth_like_date,
    relationship_to_head
  )
```



Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
